characters.name: Three clay figurines
characters.appearance: Small molded clay dolls with painted jackets, caps, white trousers, moustaches, and formal, slightly aristocratic styling

characters.name: Cat Iniguês
characters.appearance: A cat that appears suddenly in motion, the force that shatters the figurines

environment: A shelf-like interior display with staged clay figurines, then a brief moment of chaos as the cat jumps in and leaves broken terracotta shards on the floor; the final image is the aftermath with the figures reduced to pieces near their feet
